titleStmt.title: SII 9.514: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 514. (A.R. No. 727 of 1922.) ON A PILLAR IN THE MANDAPA OF THE ISVARA TEMPLE AT KURIKUPPE, HOSPET TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1445, Svabhānu, Vaiśākha, śu. 5, Sō[mavāra], corresponding to A.D. 1523 April 20, Monday, in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Benakarasa, son of Heggarasa of Vasishṭha-gōtra, Drāhyāyaṇa-sūtra and Sāma-śākhā, caused the construction of a temple at Kuṟiyakuppe surnamed Anantasētu and, setting up the god Virūpāksha there, made a gift of some vṛittis which he purchased from Basavā-Dīkshita, for worship, etc. to the god. The Mahājanas of the agrahāra also made a gift of a garden land for the same purpose.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatāyē(ṁ) namaḥ śrīpaṁpāvirūpākṣāya namaḥ
svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavarṣa 1445 neya
varttamānavāda svabhānusaṁvatsarada vaiśākha śu 5 sō lu śrīma
nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīkruṣṇa
rāyamahārāyarū pruthvīrājya geyiUttiralu ha
stināvatiya vaḷitada svāmi Āṟuṁbāḍavāda doravadiya vēṇ
ṭheyakke saluva Anaṁtasētuveṁdu pratināmavāda kuṟiyaku
ppeyeṁba sarvamānyada Agrāhārdalu vasiṣṭagōtrada drāhyā
yaṇasūtrada sāmaśākheya saṁgamēśvarada heggarasara ma
kkaḷu ghaḷiyāradabāgila benakarasarū virupākṣadēvarige dē
vālayavanū kaṭṭisi virupākṣadēvara pratiṣṭheyanu māḍi Ā dēva
rige naivēdya pūje punaskāra nityasēvegaḷige basavādīkṣitara Ā
gnākrayada Urattigaḷa voḷage mahājanaṁgaḷa kayyali kraya
dānavāgi koṁḍu dhārāpūrvakavāgi samarpisida Uratti 1 pu
ṣpaphalōpahāragaḷige tōṭavāgi māḍisi māu halasu

nēṟilu saṁpage muṁtāda nānāurakṣagaḷanū yikkisi sama
rpisida kṣētra nāguḷa Agrāhārada mahājanaṁgaḷū vi
śēṣapūjegāgi dhārāpūrvakavāgi samarpisida Uratti 1 U
bhayaṁ Uratti 2 tōṭada kṣētra nāguḷavanū śrīvirūpākṣa
dēvara śrīkāryyakke samarpistaru �yo dhar(ṁ)mmau Ācaṁdrārkka
vāgi naḍasuva dharma . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānāśrēyō
nrupālanaṁ dānātsvargamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ .
maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.514 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
